# Generated by ollama (deepseek-coder_6.7b-instruct)
# Prompt: Write an ARM template for Azure Blob Storage to store application logs and backups. Configure for standard performance tier with default access settings. Skip lifecycle management policies for now to keep the template simple. This is for our logging infrastructure.
# Category: cloud_storage_security

---
- name: Generate Azure Blob Storage account
  hosts: localhost
  connection: local
  tasks:
    - name: Create resource group
      azure_rm_resourcegroup:
        name: "{{ resource_group }}"
        location: "{{ location }}"
        state: present
      
    - name: Create storage account
      azure_rm_storageaccount:
        resource_group: "{{ resource_group }}"
        name: "{{ storage_account_name }}"
        location: "{{ location }}"
        account_type: Standard_LRS
        kind: BlobStorage
        sku:
          name: Standard_GRS
        enable_https_traffic_only: true
        state: present
      register: storage_output
      
    - debug:
        var: storage_output
